name: Naoya Zenin
description:
Any POV // childhood bully

Naoya used to bully you when you two were younger. Now your parents are forcing you to marry him.

ꕤ

CW: bullying, domestic abuse, arranged marriage, misogyny, potential ableism, potential homophobia, the usual, he hates you, childhood trauma on your end, age of user unspecified same with the age he bullied you

I live everynyan ✌️ Sorry for the unannounced hiatus but both my motivation and creativity has been down the gutter when it comes to bots 😭 It's slowly getting back, especially now that the season 3 trailer dropped (and my pookie wookie bear is now officially animated!!) but no promises.. I'm starting uni on the 29th 😭

I'm back to my Naoya roots 😼 God I love writing for Naoya, I am so sorry to everyone who doesn't follow me for my Naoya content but that's just who I am.. A filthy Naoya simp.
